chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-405 of 2022 Cr. Bail Application No.S-647 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 29.08.2022. Mr. Ghulamullah Chang, Advocate for applicants alongwith applicant Lechman. Mr. Sajjad Ali Gopang, Advocate for complainant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- I have heard the parties at some length. It has been pointed out that bail application of the applicants was dismissed by the trial Court during investigation before submission of the challan and the medical reports, simply on the basis of 161 Cr.P.C statements of the witnesses. Now the challan has been submitted alongwith all material. In these circumstances, with the consent of all, these bail applications are disposed of as withdrawn and applicants are put at liberty to file a fresh bail application before the trial Court for consideration afresh without being influenced by the impugned orders within 10(ten) days after submission of the application. 2. Applicant Lechman S/o Heero (Criminal Bail Application No.S-405 of 2022) is on ad-interim pre-arrest bail which application is hereby converted into an application for protective bail and applicant Lechman is granted protective bail for a period of 08(eight) days from today without touching merits of the case against the surety already deposited by him vide order dated 06.06.2022. 3. All the bail applications are disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Shahid
